% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for esr_cdf
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={ESR [bit/s/Hz]},
    ylabel={CDF},
    grid=major,
    legend pos=south east,
  ]
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=CentralMassiveMimoColor, dash dot,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Central massive MIMO}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedFixedColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed fixed}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, dashed,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable (Opt. 1)}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, solid,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable (Opt. 2)}
    \addplot[const plot mark right, no markers, line width=1.2pt, color=DistributedMovableColor, dotted,each nth point=5] table[x=esr_bps_hz,y=cdf,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/esr_cdf_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable (Opt. 3)}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
